title: Blackspur BB-AG220 Thin Cutting Disc Set
features: Extra thin cutting discs for all makes of angle grinder
description: Product Description Blackspur disc set contains 2 thin stainless steel cutting discs which are 115mm in size. They are suitable for all makes of angle grinder. Operating Speed: 80m/s (max). Revolutions per minute is 13300. Measures 115mm diameter by 1mm thick, 22.2mm bore. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 2x Cutting Disc
